name: Crockpot Orange Cinnamon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chicken, cut into serving pieces
1 cup chicken broth, homemade or canned
salt and fresh black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from 8 boneless chicken thighs.
2. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat, then brown the chicken pieces on all sides. Transfer them to the slow cooker as they become browned.
3. In the same skillet, sauté 4 minced garlic cloves in remaining butter until fragrant.
4. Add orange juice, raisins, salt, pepper, cinnamon and flour to the skillet. Stir well to combine.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken pieces in the slow cooker. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours or until the chicken is tender.
6. After cooking low for several hours, remove about 1 cup of sauce from the pot and whisk it with additional flour to form a slurry. Return the slurry to the pot and stir well.
7. Continue cooking on HIGH for an additional 30 minutes to thicken the sauce. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Serve hot over rice or vegetables, garnished with fresh herbs like parsley if desired.
